steps.title: Text Stream Portal live scenario
steps.action: connect and open resident session
steps.expected_visual: operator follows JSON step transcript

steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Portal size resolved
steps.action: scale portal defaults from live scene dimensions unless explicit size overrides were provided
steps.expected_visual: portal occupies a readable portion of the detected display

steps.title: Baseline render
steps.action: publish full portal chrome + transcript viewport
steps.expected_visual: portal surface appears at right edge with header, body, footer

steps.title: Baseline render
steps.action: hold for operator observation
steps.expected_visual: portal surface visible; body text readable

steps.title: Composer focus gained
steps.action: runtime focus manager focused the composer hit region
steps.expected_visual: subsequent keyboard events route to composer

steps.title: Composer pointer down
steps.action: input composer received pointer down
steps.expected_visual: keyboard focus should move to composer

steps.title: Composer key down received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key input; draft state update arrives via composer_draft_state
steps.expected_visual: editing result arrives via runtime-owned draft-state event

steps.action: runtime delivered key input; draft state update arrives via composer_draft_state
steps.expected_visual: editing result arrives via runtime-owned draft-state event

steps.action: runtime-owned draft buffer delivered coalesced text+cursor snapshot
steps.expected_visual: composer text window reflects runtime draft state
